base.footer_note: If this message does not concern you, you can ignore it or contact us.

password-reset.subject: Password Reset Request
password-reset.heading: Reset your password
password-reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your {{ projectName }} account. If you did not make this request, you can safely ignore this email.
password-reset.expiry_notice: Important: This link will expire in 24 hours.

user-invitation.subject: You have been invited
user-invitation.heading: You've been invited!
user-invitation.body: You have been invited to join. Click the button below to accept this invitation.

user-registration.subject: Verify your email address
user-registration.heading: Verify your email address
user-registration.body: Thanks for registering. To complete your registration, verify your email address by clicking the link below.
